channel.title: Portfolio on Anatole HAGBE | DevOps & Cloud Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Portfolio on Anatole HAGBE | DevOps & Cloud Engineer

item.title: K8s GitOps Platform
item.author: ahagbes89@gmail.com (Anatole HAGBE)
item.description:
A fully automated GitOps platform built for a team of 30+ engineers. Manages 15 microservices across dev, staging, and production environments.

What it does

  • Declarative application delivery via ArgoCD with automatic sync
  • Helm chart library for standardized service deployments
  • Terraform modules for EKS cluster provisioning and networking
  • Slack notifications for deployment events and failures
  • Automated rollback on failed health checks

Tech Stack

AWS EKS ArgoCD Helm Terraform GitHub Actions Prometheus Grafana

item.title: Terraform AWS Baseline
item.author: ahagbes89@gmail.com (Anatole HAGBE)
item.description:
An open-source Terraform module set that bootstraps a secure AWS multi-account organization from scratch, following AWS Well-Architected Framework guidelines.

Modules Included

  • Organization — AWS Organizations + SSO setup
  • Networking — VPC, subnets, Transit Gateway, VPN
  • Security — GuardDuty, Security Hub, Config, CloudTrail
  • IAM — Permission sets, SCPs, IAM Identity Center
  • Logging — Centralized log archive account
  • Monitoring — CloudWatch alarms + SNS baseline

Tech Stack

Terraform AWS Python GitHub Actions Terratest

item.title: Observability Stack
item.author: ahagbes89@gmail.com (Anatole HAGBE)
item.description:
A complete open-source observability solution deployed on Kubernetes using the LGTM stack (Loki, Grafana, Tempo, Mimir).

Features

  • Metrics collection with Prometheus + Mimir for long-term storage
  • Log aggregation with Loki and Promtail
  • Distributed tracing with Tempo
  • Pre-built Grafana dashboards for Kubernetes and common services
  • Alertmanager rules for SLO-based alerts
  • Helm chart for one-command deployment

Tech Stack

Prometheus Grafana Loki Tempo Mimir Helm Kubernetes
